title: Savyasachi
desc: Vikram has alien hand syndrome. He falls in love with Chitra, but his life changes when his brother-in-law is killed and his niece is kidnapped. He must save her.

title: Marjaavan
desc: Raghu, a loyal gangster, earns the trust of local don Narayan Anna, becoming his favourite. But envy brews in Narayan's son Vishnu, who plots to bring Raghu down and reclaim his father's attention.

title: Ismart Shankar
desc: Ismart Shankar, a killer, murders a politician. A cop, Arun, investigates but dies. Arun's memory is transferred into Shankar to solve the case.

title: A..Aa
desc: A..Aa is a romantic family drama featuring Nithiin and Samantha, blending humor and emotions while exploring love and strong family relationships in a heartwarming story.

title: Sabse Bada Don
desc: Seenu, inspired by 'Don,' works for Machiraju against Narsing. He aims to win Narsing's sister's heart but falls for Deepthi. A twist changes everything, leading to unexpected story developments.

title: King Kong
desc: King Kong

title: Legend The Terror
desc: A battle of survival where a brave hero faces ruthless enemies, standing strong with courage and resilience in a terrifying fight against destruction.

title: Rummy The Great Gambler
desc: A man's hilarious hunt for a job spirals into chaos as each plan backfires, creating a whirlwind of funny mishaps, unexpected twists, and heartfelt moments in his journey.

title: Movie
desc: Bringing the best in television.

title: Take One Storiez: Bhaiyya Ji
desc: This show teaches real Marathi cooking! It shares traditional recipes from Maharashtra homes and keeps the state's food history alive for everyone to enjoy.

title: Take One Storiez: 12Th Fail
desc: Meet Manoj and Shraddha, the real inspirations behind 12th Fail. They open up about failures, resilience, and love, with director Vidhu Vinod Chopra sharing his creative journey.
